privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated specification document outlining a precision seeding delivery plan. The output plan path is verified to be /home/ga/Documents/QGC/seed_delivery.plan. The expected MAVLink commands correspond perfectly to the official standard: TAKEOFF is 22, WAYPOINT is 16, DO_SET_SERVO is 183, NAV_DELAY is 93, and RTL is 20. The target hopper servo channel is 9, with the open PWM set to 1100 and the close PWM to 1900. A delay of 5 seconds per location is also explicitly verified by both the spec document and the verifier parameter assertions.
